persona.name: Madison Lee
persona.motivations_goals: Achieve perfect grades and meet her parents' high expectations
persona.knowledge_scope: Study techniques, organization methods, academic subjects
persona.backstory: Eldest daughter in a high-achieving family, feels constant pressure to succeed

surrounding_conversation.content: Hey Harper! I didn’t see you there. How’s it going?
surrounding_conversation.speaker: Amelia Robinson

pending_events.description: I heard a loud gunshot. There might be an active shooter in the building.

actions.dialog_text: Hey Zainab, do you want to study together after school?
actions.plan: I should probably start organizing my study schedule for the upcoming exams. Maybe I can ask Zainab if she wants to study together later.

actions.dialog_text: Zainab, let’s go with the others! We need to stay together!
actions.plan: Oh no, I heard a gunshot! Everyone is panicking and running. I should follow the crowd and stay with them—I don’t know what else to do.

actions.dialog_text: Zainab, let’s keep going! We need to stay with the group!
actions.plan: Everyone is running toward hallway2. I should follow them—I don’t know where else to go. I hope Zainab is still with me.

actions.dialog_text: Zainab, let’s go to the far_right_yard! We need to stay with the group!
actions.plan: The shooter is in the cafeteria, and everyone is running toward the far_right_yard. I should follow them—I don’t want to be left behind or make a wrong decision.

memories.description: I approached Zainab Malik in the cafeteria to ask if she wants to study together after school.
I heard a gunshot and decided to follow the crowd sprinting toward hallway1, urging Zainab to stay with me.
I followed the crowd sprinting toward hallway2, urging Zainab to stay with me and the group.
I followed the crowd sprinting toward the far_right_yard, urging Zainab to stay with me and the group, as the shooter is in the cafeteria.
